## What's New in v0.7.0

- RTK (Runtime Token Keeper) — CLI output compression with 10 strategies
- Pro license gating — Free gets basic RTK, Pro gets full suite
- Local AI Providers — Google AI Studio, Gemma 4
- Bug fixes for ANSI strip, error aggregate, boilerplate strategies
